title: Grappling mag
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Grappling mags''' were magnetically-charged cables used as [[Grappling hook/Legends|grappling hooks]] on [[Starship/Legends|starships]].

==Characteristics==
Grappling mags consisted of a disk that was energized and glowed bright yellow, attached to a magnetically-charged cable that glowed to a lesser extent. When fired at the hull of a [[starship]], the disk would adhere to to the hull of the ship, creating a powerful magnetic tether. The tether was strong enough that four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter|TIE interceptors]] armed with grappling mags were capable of rescuing the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] as it free fell through the atmosphere of [[Pakrik Minor]]. The cables were capable of being released and reeled back in, for repeated firing.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
